name: Survival Game
description: Gather resources, craft tools, and survive in a hostile environment

mechanics.coreLoop: Gather resources → Craft tools → Build shelter → Hunt/Farm food → Defend against threats → Expand base
playerActions: Harvest resources (wood, stone, plants) from environment
Hunt animals or fish for food
Sleep to restore stamina and save progress
Fend off hostile creatures or players
Explore to discover new biomes and resources

mechanics: Tool quality tiers (stone → iron → steel → advanced)
Base expansion from simple tent to fortified compound
Tame animals as companions or food sources

winConditions: Survive for target number of days
Defeat final boss or escape the island
Build signal fire and get rescued
failConditions: Freezing in cold biomes without shelter
Killed by hostile creatures or players

resourceSystems.name: Hunger
resourceSystems.mechanics: Depletes over time, restored by eating cooked food. Starvation causes health loss.

resourceSystems.name: Thirst
resourceSystems.mechanics: Depletes faster than hunger, restored by drinking clean water. Dehydration causes stamina loss.

resourceSystems.name: Health
resourceSystems.mechanics: Damaged by falls, combat, environmental hazards. Heals slowly or with medical items.

resourceSystems.name: Stamina
resourceSystems.mechanics: Used for sprinting, swimming, combat. Regenerates when resting.

resourceSystems.name: Temperature
resourceSystems.mechanics: Affected by weather, biome, and clothing. Extreme temps cause health drain.

resourceSystems.name: Crafting Materials
resourceSystems.mechanics: Wood, stone, metal ore, plant fibers. Gathered from environment and enemies.

setting.era: Post-apocalyptic, prehistoric, or stranded on alien planet
setting.location: Vast wilderness with diverse biomes (forest, desert, tundra, swamp, mountains)
setting.worldType: Harsh and unforgiving natural environment with hostile wildlife

protagonist.background: Survivor of a catastrophe (plane crash, shipwreck, zombie outbreak, alien invasion)
protagonist.motivation: Stay alive, find other survivors, escape the hostile environment, or rebuild civilization

conflict.primary: Survive against nature's harsh conditions and hostile creatures
secondary: Scarcity of food and clean water
Mysterious force preventing escape from the area

worldRules.physics: Realistic physics with gravity, weather systems, day/night cycles, and seasonal changes
worldRules.magic: None (unless fantasy survival variant with mystical elements)
worldRules.technology: Primitive tools and crafting. Scavenge pre-collapse technology (optional: advanced crafting unlocks)

difficulty: High difficulty with punishing consequences for mistakes
targetAudience: Players who enjoy resource management, exploration, and overcoming harsh challenges
